archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Archetype 4 (High-Contrast) - Premium Automotive
design_philosophy: Ultra-premium dark interface treating vehicles as art. High contrast with deep obsidian backgrounds, pure white text, and aggressive signal red accents. Cinematic layout for showcase, high-density clarity for admin dashboard.

typography.font_strategy: The 'Editorial Future' pairing. Wide Display Sans for presence, clean Geometric Sans for data.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing for Marketing, Control Room density for Admin.
layout_spacing.section_padding: py-20 md:py-32 px-4 md:px-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto
layout_spacing.surface_strategy: Flat Solid surfaces with 1px subtle borders (border-[#262626]). No glowing drop shadows, opt for crisp technical lines.

components_strategy.navigation: Crystal Glass sticky header: bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#262626] z-50.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: bg-[#D92D20] text-white hover:bg-[#B91C1C] rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold transition-colors. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black.
components_strategy.vehicle_cards: Cardless design. Image wrapper with aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden. Image has hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700. Content below image left-aligned, tight spacing. 1px border bottom on the card.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn based. bg-[#121212] border-[#262626] text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D92D20]. No rounded corners (rounded-none).
components_strategy.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center.
components_strategy.data_tables: Shadcn table for Admin. Dense, border-collapse, text-sm, text-left.

home_page.hero: Full-bleed background image with bg-black/50 overlay. H1 left-aligned: 'DRIVE YOUR DREAM', red primary CTA 'Ver Estoque'.
home_page.featured_cars: Bento grid or 3-column layout highlighting top tier vehicles.
home_page.about_teaser: High-contrast split section: 50% image, 50% typography heavy text.

inventory_page.layout: Sidebar filters (left, 3 cols) + Vehicle Grid (right, 9 cols).
inventory_page.filters: Accordions for Brand, Model, Year, Price range slider, Kilometers, Transmission, Fuel Type.

vehicle_detail_page.gallery: Hero image full width + thumbnail grid below.
vehicle_detail_page.specs: Grid of specs using small monoline icons (lucide-react).
vehicle_detail_page.financing_simulator: Interactive widget inside a 1px border container. Sliders for down payment and terms.
vehicle_detail_page.cta: Sticky bottom bar on mobile, prominent right sidebar on desktop to 'Contact via WhatsApp' or 'Send Proposal'.

admin_dashboard.stats_overview: Top row bento boxes: Total Vehicles, Active Leads, Total Views.
admin_dashboard.inventory_manager: CRUD table with photo upload preview, price, status toggle.

motion_interactions.scroll_effects: Use lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Reveal elements on scroll (framer-motion fade-up).
motion_interactions.micro_interactions: Images scale slightly on hover. Red elements use a subtle brightness increase.

hero_background.description: Black porsche parked inside a luxury showroom, dark cinematic vibe.

featured_car_1.description: Lamborghini in a sleek modern showroom.

featured_car_2.description: Blue sports car driving on a winding road.

about_image.description: A luxury car displayed in a showroom with neon lights.

testing_accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on #0A0A0A passes AAA. Form borders must be visible.
testing_accessibility.test_ids: All buttons, filters, and form inputs must have descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='inventory-filter-brand', data-testid='admin-login-submit').
testing_accessibility.focus_states: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D92D20] focus:outline-none applied to all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling based on the color palette above. Do not use raw CSS.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Implement Shadcn UI for forms, selects, tables, and accordions, but heavily customize them to remove default styling (remove rounded corners, use dark borders).
Create a responsive multi-page structure using React Router (Home, Estoque, Detalhes, Sobre, Contato, Admin).
Mock the API connections to the 'Auto Manager (Lovable/Supabase)' for the MVP.
Use the provided image URLs as src for all media tags. NEVER use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
Implement the WhatsApp floating button site-wide.
Ensure the application language is set to Portuguese (Brazil).
